calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Robert Findlay, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Marconi Plastering Company, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on May 12, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed September 9, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed August 31, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Robert Findlay, and against the Defaulted Defendant Marconi Plastering Company, Inc. as follows:

Interest - $221.23.
Costs - $209.85, for a total judgment in the amount of $431.08.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
